buildings.name: Air Separator
buildings.description: Performs a cryogenic distillation process at temperatures reaching -200 ºC to separate atmospheric air into its primary components -OxygenandNitrogen.

buildings.name: Alloy Mixer
buildings.description: Mixes two molten metals to produce a uniform, high-quality alloy.

buildings.name: Aluminum Cell
buildings.description: Uses electrolysis to extract pure aluminum from molten alumina. Consumes large amounts of electricity and carbon electrodes needs periodic replacements.

buildings.name: Anaerobic Digester
buildings.description: Performs a process in which microorganisms break down biodegradable material in the absence ofOxygento produce fuels andFertilizer.

buildings.name: Arc Furnace
buildings.description: Melts metals via a powerful electric arc. The arc is deployed using graphite anodes that are partially spent during the process due to the high heat. Beware that the furnace consumes a significant amount of power. It would be polity to notify your local power plan before turning this on.

buildings.name: Arc Furnace II
buildings.description: This furnace has a cooling system to safely reach higher operating temperatures. This provides increased throughput and an opportunity to reuse some of the excess heat. Power requirements are increased as well.

buildings.name: Assembly I
buildings.description: Manual assembly line that produces basic products.

buildings.name: Assembly I
buildings.description: Manual assembly line that produces basic products.

buildings.name: Assembly II
buildings.description: Electrified assembly line that is faster and can produce more advanced products.

buildings.name: Assembly II
buildings.description: Electrified assembly line that is faster and can produce more advanced products.

buildings.name: Assembly III
buildings.description: Electrified assembly line that is faster and can produce more advanced products.

buildings.name: Assembly III
buildings.description: Electrified assembly line that is faster and can produce more advanced products.

buildings.name: Assembly IV
buildings.description: Robotic assembly that is faster and can produce more advanced products.

buildings.name: Assembly IV
buildings.description: Robotic assembly that is faster and can produce more advanced products.

buildings.name: Assembly V
buildings.description: Robotic assembly that is faster and can produce more advanced products.

buildings.name: Assembly V
buildings.description: Robotic assembly that is faster and can produce more advanced products.

buildings.name: Baking Unit
buildings.description: Boost by Unity: Available

buildings.name: Barrier
buildings.description: Barrier that blocks vehicle access.

buildings.name: Basic Distiller
buildings.description: Allows distillation of low-grade gasoline but it is quite inefficient and produces a lot of waste.

buildings.name: Beacon
buildings.description: Strong light helps otherrefugeesto find your island and join you.

buildings.name: Biomass Collection
buildings.description: Collects organic waste (leftovers from food typically). If a settlement does not have this module built, all the organic waste ends up in general waste.

buildings.name: Blast Furnace
buildings.description: Smelts various materials such asIronandCopper. The output is amolten materialthat needs to be sent viaMolten Channeltransport, for instance, into aCasterfor further processing. Molten materials cannot be transported viaTrucks.

buildings.name: Blast Furnace II
buildings.description: Smelts various materials such asIronandCopper. The output is amolten materialthat needs to be sent viaMolten Channeltransport, for instance, into aCasterfor further processing. Molten materials cannot be transported viaTrucks.

buildings.name: Boiler
buildings.description: Produces high pressure steam by loose products (such as coal) to boil water.

buildings.name: Boiler
buildings.description: Produces high pressure steam by loose products (such as coal) to boil water.

buildings.name: Boiler (Electric)
buildings.description: Produces high pressure steam by boiling water. Basically a giant kettle. But not recommended for tea preparation.

buildings.name: Boiler (Electric)
buildings.description: Produces high pressure steam by boiling water. Basically a giant kettle. But not recommended for tea preparation.

buildings.name: boiler_gas
buildings.description: Produces high pressure steam by burning gas.

buildings.name: Burner (Solid)
buildings.description: Available

buildings.name: Captain's Office II
buildings.description: Enables you to declare edicts that can significantly affect your island'spopulationand industry. Some edicts can provide you with benefits but may cost you monthlyUnity. Other edicts can generate monthly Unity, but these typically require you to provides something in return. Edicts can be toggled anytime.

buildings.name: Captain's Office II
buildings.description: Enables you to declare edicts that can significantly affect your island'spopulationand industry. Some edicts can provide you with benefits but may cost you monthlyUnity. Other edicts can generate monthly Unity, but these typically require you to provides something in return. Edicts can be toggled anytime.

buildings.name: Cargo Depot
buildings.description: Once built, a repairedCargo Shipcan dock here and transfer its cargo via attached Cargo Depot modules.

buildings.name: Cargo Depot
buildings.description: Once built, a repairedCargo Shipcan dock here and transfer its cargo via attached Cargo Depot modules.

buildings.name: Cargo Depot
buildings.description: Once built, a repairedCargo Shipcan dock here and transfer its cargo via attached Cargo Depot modules.

buildings.name: Cargo Depot
buildings.description: Once built, a repairedCargo Shipcan dock here and transfer its cargo via attached Cargo Depot modules.

buildings.name: Chemical Plant
buildings.description: Performs general chemical production.

buildings.name: Chemical Plant II
buildings.description: Performs general chemical production.

buildings.name: Chicken Farm
buildings.description: Enables to raise chickens foreggsandmeat. Chickens need to be provided with water andanimal feed. To obtain some chickens you cantradewith a village on the world map.

buildings.name: Clinic
buildings.description: Provides Medical Supplies, Medical Supplies II and Medical Supplies III for an attached settlement. Providing Medical goods to a settlement increases Health of the community, cures diseases and generates extra Unity.

buildings.name: Coal Maker
buildings.description: UsesWoodto createCoalbut it is quite inefficient.

buildings.name: Compactor
buildings.description: Presses loose items into compact units for easier transportation. Ashreddercan be used to restore compacted products back to their uncompacted state.

buildings.name: Concrete Mixer
buildings.description: High-power mixer that createsConcrete Slabs.

buildings.name: Concrete Mixer II
buildings.description: High-power mixer that createsConcrete Slabs. Also provides alternative recipes for concrete.

buildings.name: Concrete Mixer III
buildings.description: Boost by Unity: Available

buildings.name: Consumer Electronics Module
buildings.description: Provides appliances electronics to the attached settlement which generates extra Unity.

buildings.name: Cooled Caster
buildings.description: Casts molten materials into slabs. This one also utilizes water for cooling to speed up the process.

buildings.name: Cooled Caster II
buildings.description: Casts molten materials into slabs. This one also utilizes water for cooling to speed up the process.

buildings.name: Cooling Tower
buildings.description: ImprovesWaterefficiency of a power plant by recovering some steam back to Water.

buildings.name: Cooling Tower (Large)
buildings.description: ImprovesWaterefficiency of a power plant by recovering some steam back to Water.

buildings.name: Copper Electrolysis
buildings.description: Purifies copper by electrolytic refining to over 99.95% purity.

buildings.name: Cracking Unit
buildings.description: Transforms different fuel types between each other to help with consumption imbalance.

buildings.name: Crusher
buildings.description: Crushes ores into more fine grained materials so they can be used in advanced processing.

buildings.name: Crusher (Large)
buildings.description: Large crusher for better efficiency and increased throwput.

buildings.name: Data Center
buildings.description: Datacenter is used to host server racks that you add to it. Each added server rack provides computing as a resource that can be used on your island. Computing is used in advanced machines such as robotic assemblers or microchip makers. It is worth noting that each server rack has its power, cooling, and maintenance demands. However, some people say that all it does is to persist and search in a vast collection of pictures of cats and memes - we were not able to debunk this.

buildings.name: Diamond Reactor
buildings.description: Compresses graphite under extreme heat and pressure to create synthetic diamonds.

buildings.name: Diesel Fuel Module
buildings.description: Fuel module for refueling locomotives withDiesel.

buildings.name: Diesel Generator
buildings.description: BurnsDieselto createElectricity.

buildings.name: Diesel Generator II
buildings.description: More powerful generator. Can serve as a power as backup.

buildings.name: Distillation (Stage I)
buildings.description: The entry point for advancedCrude Oilprocessing. Separates oil into two components for additional processing into useful resources.

buildings.name: Distillation (Stage II)
buildings.description: Introduces extra distillation steps to expand oil processing capabilities.

buildings.name: Distillation (Stage III)
buildings.description: Introduces extra distillation steps to expand oil processing capabilities.

buildings.name: Electrolyzer
buildings.description: Decomposes a product into simpler substances by passing an electric current through it.

buildings.name: Electrolyzer II
buildings.description: Decomposes a product into simpler substances by passing an electric current through it.

buildings.name: Empty Station Module
buildings.description: Empty station module which can act as a placeholder or decoration.

buildings.name: Enrichment Plant
buildings.description: Utilizes a large set of centrifuges to concentrate uranium-235 isotope out of naturalUranium(a process called isotope separation). The resulting product is fissileUranium Pellets, ready to undergo a chain reaction in aNuclear Reactor. The pellets are not radioactive yet and can be handled manually.

buildings.name: Evaporation Pond
buildings.description: ProducesSaltby evaporating residualWaterfromBrine.

buildings.name: Evaporation Pond (Heated)
buildings.description: ProducesSaltby evaporating residualWaterfromBrine. The process is accelerated by utilizing a set of electric heaters.

buildings.name: Exhaust Scrubber
buildings.description: Filters 75% of pollutants from hotExhaustgasses by extracting useful resources.

buildings.name: Farm
buildings.description: Allows growing variouscrops. Can be used forFoodproduction. This farm depends onrainonly. To supplyWaterfrom external sources it needs to be upgraded.

buildings.name: Fermentation Tank
buildings.description: Employs microorganisms to convert sugars Into other useful substances such as ethanol. The microorganisms employed here are not getting any salary (they just love sugar).

buildings.name: Flare
buildings.description: Can burn combustible liquids and gasses but producesPollution.

buildings.name: Flat Balancer
buildings.description: Allows distributing and prioritizing products using any of its two input and output ports.

buildings.name: Flat Sorter
buildings.description: Allows sorting of products.

buildings.name: Fluid Module (L)
buildings.description: Cargo Depotmodule for transferringfluid materials(such asoil). It can be built in any empty slot of a Cargo Depot. Unloads cargo 100% faster comparing to thebasic module.

buildings.name: Fluid Module (M)
buildings.description: Cargo Depotmodule for transferringfluid materials(such asoil). It can be built in any empty slot of a Cargo Depot. Unloads cargo 50% faster comparing to thebasic module.

required_research: Cargo Depot II (page does not exist)

buildings.name: Fluid Module (S)
buildings.description: Cargo Depotmodule for transferringfluid materials(such asoil). It can be built in any empty slot of a Cargo Depot.

buildings.name: Fluid Station Module
buildings.description: Handles loading and unloading of trains withFluid Cargo.

buildings.name: Fluid Storage
buildings.description: Stores up to 200 units of aliquid product

buildings.name: Fluid Storage II
buildings.description: Stores up to 500 units of aliquid product

buildings.name: Fluid Storage III
buildings.description: Stores up to 3000 units of aliquid product

buildings.name: Fluid Storage IV
buildings.description: Stores up to 6000 units of aliquid product

buildings.name: Flywheel
buildings.description: The Flywheel is able to store 500 MW-seconds worth of Mechanical Power as inertia of a spinning mass.

buildings.name: Food Market
buildings.description: Provides food for attached settlement. A settlement needs to have at least one Food Market attached otherwise its population will starve.

buildings.name: Food Market II
buildings.description: Provides Food for attached settlement. This one can store multiple type of products.

buildings.name: Food Processor
buildings.description: Available for food production.

buildings.name: Fuel Station
buildings.description: Trucksassigned to a fuel station will automatically refuelexcavatorsandtree harvestersat their working site so they don’t waste their time going for fuel on their own.

buildings.name: Fuel Station II
buildings.description: Trucksassigned to a fuel station will automatically refuelexcavatorsandtree harvestersat their working site so they don’t waste their time going for fuel on their own. Provides increased storage and refueling rate compared to theprevious tier.

buildings.name: Fuel Station III
buildings.description: Trucksassigned to a fuel station will automatically refuelexcavatorsandtree harvestersat their working site so they don’t waste their time going for fuel on their own. Provides increased storage and refueling rate compared to theprevious tier.

buildings.name: Gas Injection Pump
buildings.description: Provides permanent disposal of gases such ascarbon dioxideby dissolving them in a liquid and injecting them under pressure into the ground. Has no pollution effect.

buildings.name: Glass Maker
buildings.description: Casts molten glass into glass sheets.

buildings.name: Glass Maker II
buildings.description: Casts molten glass into glass sheets and with much greater efficiency.

buildings.name: Gold Furnace
buildings.description: Available

buildings.name: Greenhouse
buildings.description: Has 20% increased crop yield compared to the basic farm.

buildings.name: Greenhouse II
buildings.description: Has 50% increased crop yield compared to the basic farm.

buildings.name: Groundwater Pump
buildings.description: Pumps water from the ground deposit which is replenished during rain. Has to be built on top of a groundwater deposit.

buildings.name: High-Pressure Turbine
buildings.description: Uses high pressure steam to create mechanical power.

buildings.name: High-Pressure Turbine
buildings.description: Uses high pressure steam to create mechanical power.

buildings.name: High-Pressure Turbine II
buildings.description: Uses high pressure steam to create mechanical power.

buildings.name: High-Pressure Turbine II
buildings.description: Uses high pressure steam to create mechanical power.

buildings.name: Household Appliances Module
buildings.description: Provides appliances electronics to the attached settlement which generates extra Unity.

buildings.name: Household Goods Module
buildings.description: Provides Household Goods for an attached settlement. Providing Household Goods to a settlement generates extra Unity.

buildings.name: Housing
buildings.description: Primitive housing for 80peoplemade of shipping containers.

buildings.name: Housing II
buildings.description: Advanced housing for 140peoplethat provides more comfort. It can also provide a monthlyUnityincrease if the housing is provided with required services.

buildings.name: Housing III
buildings.description: Advanced housing for 240peoplethat provides more comfort. It can also provide a monthlyUnityincrease if the housing is provided with required services.

buildings.name: Housing IV
buildings.description: Advanced housing for 400peoplethat provides more comfort. It can also provide a monthlyUnityincrease if the housing is provided with required services.

buildings.name: Hydrogen Fuel Module
buildings.description: Fuel module for refueling locomotives withHydrogen.

buildings.name: Hydrogen Fuel Station
buildings.description: Trucksassigned to a fuel station will automatically refuelexcavatorsandtree harvestersat their working site so they don’t waste their time going for fuel on their own.

buildings.name: Hydrogen Reformer
buildings.description: Available

buildings.name: Incineration Plant
buildings.description: Burns waste with much better efficiency than a basicburner. The process is energy positive and generate steam.

buildings.name: Internet Module
buildings.description: Connects a settlement to cloud which costs computing.

buildings.name: Irrigated Farm
buildings.description: Irrigated farm that can be connected to a source ofWaterorFertilizer. That could be useful.

buildings.name: Kiln
buildings.description: Produces basic products such as concrete.

buildings.name: Kiln
buildings.description: Produces basic products such as concrete.

buildings.name: Lens Polisher
buildings.description: Polishes high-precision optical lenses using a polishing compound.

buildings.name: Level Crossing
buildings.description: Allows small and medium vehicles to safely cross railway tracks.

buildings.name: Level Crossing Connector
buildings.description: An elevated road that connects neighboring level crossings.

buildings.name: Level Crossing Connector (Large)
buildings.description: An elevated road that connects neighboring level crossings.

buildings.name: Level Crossing Entrance
buildings.description: A ramp allowing vehicles to enter or exit a level crossing from ground level.

buildings.name: Level Crossing Entrance (Large)
buildings.description: A ramp allowing vehicles to enter or exit a level crossing from ground level.

buildings.name: Level Crossing (Large)
buildings.description: Allows all vehicles to safely cross railway tracks.

buildings.name: Liquid Dump
buildings.description: Allows liquid dumping into the ocean. Some liquids will causeWater Pollutionwhich can affect health and happiness of your people.

buildings.name: Loose Module
buildings.description: Cargo Depotmodule for transferringloose materials(such asBauxite). It can be built in any empty slot of a Cargo Depot. Unloads cargo 50% faster comparing to thebasic module.

required_research: Cargo Depot II (page does not exist)

buildings.name: Loose Module (L)
buildings.description: Cargo depotmodule for transferringloose materials(such asBauxite). It can be built in any empty slot of a cargo depot. Unloads cargo 120% faster comparing to thebasic module.

buildings.description: Improves power production efficiency by reusing low pressure steam to createMechanical Power.

buildings.description: Improves power production efficiency by reusing low pressure steam to createMechanical Power.

buildings.description: Improves power production efficiency by reusing low pressure steam to createMechanical Power.

buildings.name: Luxury Goods Module
buildings.description: Provides Luxury Goods for an attached settlement. Providing Household Goods to a settlement generates extra Unity.

buildings.name: Maintenance Depot
buildings.description: Converts products intomaintenancewhich is distributed to all machines, buildings, andvehiclesthat need it. Important as if there is not enough maintenance, vehicles and machines can break down temporarily.

buildings.name: Maintenance Depot
buildings.description: Converts products intomaintenancewhich is distributed to all machines, buildings, andvehiclesthat need it. Important as if there is not enough maintenance, vehicles and machines can break down temporarily.

buildings.description: Castsmolten materialsinto slabs.

buildings.name: Metal Caster II
buildings.description: Casts molten materials into slabs.

buildings.name: Mill
buildings.description: Boost by Unity: Available

buildings.name: Mine Control Tower
buildings.description: Enables assignment of excavators and trucks to designated mine areas. Only designated areas within the influence of the tower can be mined.

buildings.description: Allows distributing and prioritizing products using any of its two input and output ports.

buildings.description: Employs people on your island to generate focus points, which can be spent on bonuses.

buildings.name: Office III
buildings.description: Employs people on your island to generate focus points, which can be spent on bonuses.

buildings.name: Oil Pump
buildings.description: Pumps Crude Oil from underground.

buildings.name: Ore Sorting Plant
buildings.description: This facility handles sorting of mixed materials loaded onto your trucks by excavators. This is required as trucks can't directly deliver mixed loads to storage units or buildings.

buildings.name: Ore Sorting Plant
buildings.description: This facility handles sorting of mixed materials loaded onto your trucks by excavators. This is required as trucks can't directly deliver mixed loads to storage units or buildings.

buildings.name: Ore Sorting Plant (Large)
buildings.description: This facility handles sorting of mixed materials loaded onto your trucks by excavators. This is required as trucks can't directly deliver mixed loads to storage units or buildings.

buildings.name: Oxygen Furnace
buildings.description: Creates steel by blowing pureOxygenunder high-pressure intoMolten Iron, lowering its carbon content.

buildings.name: Oxygen Furnace II
buildings.description: Creates steel by blowing pureOxygenunder high-pressure intoMolten Iron, lowering its carbon content.

buildings.name: Pipe Balancer
buildings.description: Allows distributing and prioritizing products using any of its two input and output ports.

buildings.name: Polymerization Plant
buildings.description: Boost by Unity: Available

buildings.name: Power Generator
buildings.description: Converts Mechanical Power to Electricity. The slower it spins the lower its efficiency is.

buildings.name: Power Generator (Large)
buildings.description: Optimized power generator with lower friction and better efficiency. It just requires some planning.

required_research: Power Generation IV (page does not exist)

buildings.name: Power Generator (Large)
buildings.description: Optimized power generator with lower friction and better efficiency. It just requires some planning.

required_research: Power Generation IV (page does not exist)

buildings.name: Radioactive Waste Storage
buildings.description: A special underground storage facility that can safely manage anyradioactive wastewithout causing any danger to the island'sPopulation. Leaving a legacy for the next generations to come.

buildings.name: Radioactive Waste Storage
buildings.description: A special underground storage facility that can safely manage anyradioactive wastewithout causing any danger to the island'sPopulation. Leaving a legacy for the next generations to come.

buildings.name: Rainwater Harvester
buildings.description: Harvests rainwater during rain. Has built-in small water tank.

buildings.name: Research Lab (Basic)
buildings.description: Conducts basic research without requiring any equipment. Additional labs increase research speed.

buildings.name: Research Lab I
buildings.description: Conducts more advanced research but requires a continuous supply of Lab Equipment to operate. Additional labs increase research speed. If recycling technology is researched, the lab can return consumed products as Recyclables.

buildings.name: Research Lab I
buildings.description: Conducts more advanced research but requires a continuous supply of Lab Equipment to operate. Additional labs increase research speed. If recycling technology is researched, the lab can return consumed products as Recyclables.

buildings.name: Research Lab II
buildings.description: Conducts more advanced research but requires a continuous supply of Lab Equipment II to operate. Additional labs increase research speed. If recycling technology is researched, the lab can return consumed products as Recyclables.

buildings.name: Research Lab III
buildings.description: Conducts more advanced research but requires a continuous supply of Lab Equipment III to operate. Additional labs increase research speed. If recycling technology is researched, the lab can return consumed products as Recyclables.

buildings.name: Research Lab IV
buildings.description: Conducts more advanced research but requires a continuous supply of Lab Equipment IV to operate. Additional labs increase research speed. If recycling technology is researched, the lab can return consumed products as Recyclables.

buildings.name: Research Lab IV
buildings.description: Conducts more advanced research but requires a continuous supply of Lab Equipment IV to operate. Additional labs increase research speed. If recycling technology is researched, the lab can return consumed products as Recyclables.

buildings.name: Retaining Wall
buildings.description: Wall that retains ground level.

buildings.name: Rocket Assembly Depot
buildings.description: Constructsspace rocketsand delivers them to the nearestRocket launch padusing a specialized transporter. The transporter is a large vehicle and cannot drive over uneven ground so make sure that the Rocket launch pad is on the same height level as this building.

buildings.name: Rocket Launch Pad
buildings.description: Enables launching rockets to space! After a rocket is delivered and securely attached to the tower, it will be filled with fuel based on the rocket type. This has to match with connected fuel to this tower. Fuel is never stored at the launch pad for safety reasons. Water also needs to be connected since the launch process requires a large amount of it for dampening of rocket exhaust shockwaves.

buildings.name: Rotary Kiln
buildings.description: Performs calcination process under high temperatures. Used to produceCement.

buildings.name: Rotary Kiln (Gas)
buildings.description: Boost by Unity: Available

buildings.name: Rubber Maker
buildings.description: Produces synthetic rubber.

buildings.name: Seawater Pump
buildings.description: Pumps water from ocean. Works at the maximum height of 5 from the ocean level.

buildings.name: Seawater Pump (Tall)
buildings.description: Large pump that can be placed up to height of 11 from the ocean level. Requires more power to run.

buildings.name: Seawater Pump (Tall)
buildings.description: Large pump that can be placed up to height of 11 from the ocean level. Requires more power to run.

buildings.name: Settling Tank
buildings.description: Available

buildings.name: Shipyard
buildings.description: Serves to refuel, repair, and modify ourship. Also handles loading and unloading ship's cargo. If a truck happens to have some cargo that cannot be delivered anywhere else, it can be delivered here.

buildings.name: Shredder
buildings.description: Breaks down products into loose form.

buildings.name: Silicon Reactor
buildings.description: Purifies Silicon using Hydrogen. The processed Silicon can be used in Electronics.

buildings.name: Smoke Stack
buildings.description: Allows release of gasses into atmosphere. Some gasses such asExhaustcausePollution.

buildings.name: Smoke Stack (Large)
buildings.description: Allows release of gasses into atmosphere. Some gasses such asExhaustcauseAir Pollution.

buildings.name: Smoke Stack (Large)
buildings.description: Allows release of gasses into atmosphere. Some gasses such asExhaustcauseAir Pollution.

buildings.name: Solar Panel
buildings.description: Converts sunlight to electricity. Surprisingly, the efficiency depends on how sunny it is.

buildings.name: Solar Panel (Mono)
buildings.description: Solar panels that are made from a single crystal silicon. That makes them more expensive to produce but they provide 25% more energy.

required_research: Solar Panels II (page does not exist)

buildings.name: Solar Panel (Mono)
buildings.description: Solar panels that are made from a single crystal silicon. That makes them more expensive to produce but they provide 25% more energy.

required_research: Solar Panels II (page does not exist)

buildings.name: Sour Water Stripper
buildings.description: Makessour wateruseful by extarctingammoniaandsulfur. Sulfur can be turned intoacidand used for instance in the production ofcopper.

buildings.name: Square
buildings.description: Housing & Services

buildings.name: stacker
buildings.description: Dumps material from connected conveyor belts directly on the Terran.

buildings.name: Steam Fuel Module
buildings.description: Fuel module for refueling steam locomotives and tenders.

buildings.name: Super-Pressure Turbine
buildings.description: Uses super pressure steam to create mechanical power.

buildings.name: Super-Pressure Turbine
buildings.description: Uses super pressure steam to create mechanical power.

buildings.name: The Statue of Maintenance
buildings.description: Statue that not just demonstrates the wealth of your island but also serves as a celebration of your industrial success. It has such a positive effect on your population that it reduces your island's maintenance requirements by 4.00%. In order to get the bonus, the statue needs to be provided with 'Fuel Gas' on a continuous basis. However, if you don't maintain your statue you will get a negative effect. Because nothing demotivates your workers from performing maintenance more than seeing a broken statue of maintenance. You can build this statue multiple times should your wealth allow it, but each additional statue's effect is reduced by half.

required_research: Statue of Maintenance (page does not exist)

buildings.name: The Statue of Maintenance
buildings.description: Statue that not just demonstrates the wealth of your island but also serves as a celebration of your industrial success. It has such a positive effect on your population that it reduces your island's maintenance requirements by 4.00%. In order to get the bonus, the statue needs to be provided with 'Fuel Gas' on a continuous basis. However, if you don't maintain your statue you will get a negative effect. Because nothing demotivates your workers from performing maintenance more than seeing a broken statue of maintenance. You can build this statue multiple times should your wealth allow it, but each additional statue's effect is reduced by half.

required_research: Statue of Maintenance (page does not exist)

buildings.name: Thermal Desalinator
buildings.description: Heats saline water into vapor to collect it as clean water. Produces brine as a byproduct. Not really efficient but does the job.

buildings.name: Thermal Storage
buildings.description: Thermal storage uses steam to heat its tank of molten salt to store thermal energy. The accumulated energy can be then used to boil incoming water back to steam. The conversion process has losses but maintaining the accumulated heat does not decay while the storage is operational.

buildings.name: Tomb of Captains
buildings.description: Tomb of Captains provides final resting place for generations of captains who lead the people of this island. When completed, fires should be always lit and tomb should be decorated withflowersto pay tribute to resting Captains.

buildings.name: Trading Dock
buildings.description: Allows trading of various goods with villages on theWorld Map. All the products you trade are delivered into the Trading Dock. Also, trading can be a lifesaver if you run into a shortage of critical products, so it is advised to always have a Trading Dock available.

buildings.name: Train Depot
buildings.description: Allows building and dismantling of locomotives and wagons. Maximum train length and internal capacity can be extended by building addons.

buildings.name: train_depot_extension
buildings.description: Extends maximum train length and internal capacity of attachedTrain Depot. Multiple extensions can be chained together.

buildings.name: Train Station
buildings.description: Base building that establishes a train station. Add adjacent loading and unloading modules to create a freight station, or use stand-alone as a waypoint.

buildings.name: Transformer
buildings.description: Provides attached settlement with Electricity. Providing Electricity to a settlement generates extra Unity.

buildings.name: Tree
buildings.description: A tree that can be manually positioned without having to use a forestry tower. Planting it requires a tree sapling and a tree planting vehicle.

buildings.name: U-shape Balancer
buildings.description: Allows distributing and prioritizing products using any of its two input and output ports.

buildings.name: U-shape Sorter
buildings.description: Allows sorting of products.

buildings.name: Unit Module (L)
buildings.description: Cargo Depotmodule for transferringunit materials(such asWood). It can be built in any empty slot of a Cargo Depot. Unloads cargo 120% faster comparing to thebasic module.

required_research: Cargo Depot III (page does not exist)

buildings.name: Unit Module (M)
buildings.description: Cargo Depotmodule for transferringunit materials(such asWood). It can be built in any empty slot of a Cargo Depot. Unloads cargo 50% faster comparing to thebasic module.

required_research: Cargo Depot II (page does not exist)

buildings.name: Unit Module (S)
buildings.description: Cargo Depotmodule for transferringunit materials(such asWood). It can be built in any empty slot of a Cargo Depot.

buildings.name: Unit Station Module
buildings.description: Handles loading and unloading of trains withUnit products.

buildings.name: Unit Storage
buildings.description: Stores up to 200 units of asolid product

buildings.name: Unit Storage II
buildings.description: Stores up to 500 units of asolid product

buildings.name: Unit Storage III
buildings.description: Stores up to 3000 units of asolid product

buildings.name: Unit Storage IV
buildings.description: Stores up to 6000 units of asolid product

buildings.name: Vehicle Ramp (Large)
buildings.description: Allows vehicles to cross obstacles such as transports.

buildings.name: Vehicle Ramp (Medium)
buildings.description: Allows vehicles to cross obstacles such as transports.

buildings.name: Vehicle Ramp (Small)
buildings.description: Allows vehicles to cross obstacles such as transports.

buildings.name: vehicles_depot
buildings.description: Allows building vehicles such as trucks and excavators.

buildings.name: Vehicles Depot II
buildings.description: Allows building vehiclessuch astrucksandexcavators.

buildings.name: Vehicles Depot III
buildings.description: Allows building vehicles such as trucks and excavators.

buildings.name: Waste Sorting Plant
buildings.description: Recycling can transform your island's economy in a significant way as it allows to recover a portion of raw materials from various sources like settlement,maintenance, orresearch. Recycling reduces the need for raw minerals extraction and thus also extends longevity of deposits. Places that support recycling will return 'Recyclables'. This product can be separated via waste sorting plant into scraps (such asironorcopper scraps) which can be sent to any furnace for smelting. The ratio of materials recycled is based on 'Recycling efficiency' and more about that is explained in the waste sorting plant.

buildings.name: Wastewater Treatment
buildings.description: Converts not so nice water to nice water. Just don't tell this to the people who drink it.

buildings.name: Water Chiller
buildings.description: Boost by Unity: Available

buildings.name: Water Facility
buildings.description: Provides Water for attached settlement.
